title: Detailed Armory (RPG Series)
description: Switches the Armory models to the original detailed versions
body:
Switches the [Armory](https://modrinth.com/mod/armory-rpg-series) models to the original detailed versions.

Thank you to [Daedelus](https://modrinth.com/user/ZsoltMolnarrr) for allowing this to be uploaded.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1AkWrZD2/images/ef13cca317e676e016ab7ee5399b2eb81ec3d3eb.png)
